jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - MRF - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
